title: Deliciously Spicy Egyptian Pepper Paella
description: A spicy and tender Egyptian dish featuring roasted peppers, this plant-based paella is perfect for a weeknight dinner, made in a traditional paella pan.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large paella pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the diced roasted red peppers and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the uncooked brown rice and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Transfer the paella pan to the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the paella from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
